Repap Litepaper
  • The most lightweight performance tracker for Web3
  • Aggregating data from the most popular DeFi partners (DEXTools, DEX Screener, Debank & much more!)
  • Unlimited requests
  • Repap cannot access your assets
  • Connecting, signing or approving assets using your wallet only allows Repap to retrieve your data
  • Rest assured, your funds are always safe
